title: licania coriacea var. nitida
intro: Licania coriacea var. nitida, also known as the 'Black pod tree', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The extracts of this plant have shown potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, Licania coriacea var. nitida is used in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
